title: More Mods with Avaritia
description: Avaritia with more mods. Including ProjectE, and Applied Energistics.
body:
# Avaritia ++
This modpack is Avaritia but with many more mods to add on to the experience and make it easier to get materials.

## Mods:

### Main Mods:
- Re:Avaritia - The Main Mod which adds many stuff that require lots of resources.
- Applied Energistics 2 - It is a comprehensive mod that adds many stuff in a futuristic theme.
- Project E - Allows to compress items into EMC and tranfer them into a different material.
- Essential Mod - Host worlds for free, adds friends and much much more.
- Mystical Agriculture - Adds more Food item and a new way to use food.
- Immersive Engineering - Adds more Realistic Engineering.
- Draconic Evolution - Adds more High Tier Items.
- Extended Crafting - Extended Crafting and more ways to craft.
- Create - Adds Aethstetic Engineering like no other mod can.
- Xaero's Minimap/World Map - Adds a minimap and world map to decrease the chances of being lost.

### Quality of Life Mods:
- AI Improvements - Makes the AI for mobs better.
- AppleSkin - Better way of gauging How good food is.
- BetterF3 - For a Better F3 Menu.
- Chat Heads - Better Multiplayer Experience
- Just Enough Items - To Better find out Crafting Recipes.
- Sound Physics Remastered - More Realistic Sound.
